positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for positive.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for positive.tptp
1. ! [X0] : (hydrocarbon(X0) => organic_compound(X0)) [input(axiom)]
2. ! [X0] : (alkane(X0) => hydrocarbon(X0)) [input(axiom)]
3. ! [X0] : (organic_compound(X0) => chemical_compound(X0)) [input(axiom)]
5. ! [X0] : (chemical_compound(X0) => ~contains_only_one_element(X0)) [input(axiom)]
6. chemical_compound(mixture) <=> contains_only_one_element(mixture) [input(axiom)]
8. (contains_only_one_element(mixture) | contains_carbon(mixture)) => (~chemical_compound(mixture) & ~alkane(mixture)) [input(conjecture)]
9. ~((contains_only_one_element(mixture) | contains_carbon(mixture)) => (~chemical_compound(mixture) & ~alkane(mixture))) [negated conjecture 8]
10. ~(~chemical_compound(mixture) & ~alkane(mixture)) [pure predicate removal 9]
12. ! [X0] : (organic_compound(X0) | ~hydrocarbon(X0)) [ennf transformation 1]
13. ! [X0] : (hydrocarbon(X0) | ~alkane(X0)) [ennf transformation 2]
14. ! [X0] : (chemical_compound(X0) | ~organic_compound(X0)) [ennf transformation 3]
15. ! [X0] : (~contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0)) [ennf transformation 5]
16. chemical_compound(mixture) | alkane(mixture) [ennf transformation 10]
17. (chemical_compound(mixture) | ~contains_only_one_element(mixture)) & (contains_only_one_element(mixture) | ~chemical_compound(mixture)) [nnf transformation 6]
18. ~hydrocarbon(X0) | organic_compound(X0) [cnf transformation 12]
19. ~alkane(X0) | hydrocarbon(X0) [cnf transformation 13]
20. ~organic_compound(X0) | chemical_compound(X0) [cnf transformation 14]
21. ~contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0) [cnf transformation 15]
22. contains_only_one_element(mixture) | ~chemical_compound(mixture) [cnf transformation 17]
28. chemical_compound(mixture) | alkane(mixture) [cnf transformation 16]
30. 1 <=> alkane(mixture) [avatar definition]
32. alkane(mixture) <- (1) [avatar component clause 30]
34. 2 <=> chemical_compound(mixture) [avatar definition]
35. ~chemical_compound(mixture) <- (~2) [avatar component clause 34]
36. chemical_compound(mixture) <- (2) [avatar component clause 34]
37. 1 | 2 [avatar split clause 28,34,30]
39. 3 <=> contains_only_one_element(mixture) [avatar definition]
41. contains_only_one_element(mixture) <- (3) [avatar component clause 39]
42. ~2 | 3 [avatar split clause 22,39,34]
44. ~chemical_compound(mixture) <- (3) [resolution 21,41]
45. $false <- (2, 3) [forward subsumption resolution 44,36]
46. ~2 | ~3 [avatar contradiction clause 45]
47. hydrocarbon(mixture) <- (1) [resolution 32,19]
48. organic_compound(mixture) <- (1) [resolution 47,18]
49. chemical_compound(mixture) <- (1) [resolution 48,20]
50. $false <- (1, ~2) [forward subsumption resolution 49,35]
51. ~1 | 2 [avatar contradiction clause 50]
s1. 1 | 2 [sat_conversion 37]
s2. ~2 | 3 [sat_conversion 42]
s4. ~3 | ~2 [sat_conversion 46]
s5. ~1 | 2 [sat_conversion 51]
s6. ~2 [rat s2,s4]
s7. ~1 [rat s5,s6]
s9. # [rat s1,s6,s7]
52. $false [avatar sat refutation s9]
% SZS output end Proof for positive.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for negative.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u30,negated_conjecture,
    ~chemical_compound(mixture)).

cnf(u34,negated_conjecture,
    ~contains_only_one_element(mixture)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    mixture != organic_compound).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    mixture != hydrocarbon).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    mixture != chemical_compound).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    mixture != alkane).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~contains_only_one_element(X0) | ~chemical_compound(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define contains_carbon(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define organic_compound(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define hydrocarbon(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define alkane(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
